hero.title: Discover the best of Chile
hero.description: Majestic Andes, unique wineries and the Atacama Desert. A journey designed for those who demand the extraordinary.

services.title: Exclusivity in every kilometer.
services.subtitle: Our philosophy is based on three pillars: discretion, absolute comfort and cutting-edge technology.

items.title: Royal Suite
items.detail: Zero gravity seats, shiatsu massage and total privacy.

items.title: Sante Cava
items.detail: Our exclusive selection of wines and signature cuisine on board.

items.title: Concierge VIP
items.detail: Personalized assistance for any request during your journey.

footer.quote: "Redefining luxury in motion since 2010. For those who know that the journey is as important as the destination."
